---
title: "norn_coordinator.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\norn_coordinator.py"
loc: 64
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.90
style_score: 3.69
intel_score: 7.65
overall_score: 4.53
---

## Intent
The `norn_coordinator.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on NornCoordinator, __init__, _get_conn, _init_db, sync_tasks, get_next_bead, resolve_bead. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via NornCoordinator, __init__, _get_conn, _init_db, sync_tasks, get_next_bead, resolve_bead. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [re](file://re)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `NornCoordinator`
- `__init__`
- `_get_conn`
- `_init_db`
- `sync_tasks`
- `get_next_bead`
- `resolve_bead`
